title: taraxacum cycloides
intro: Taraxacum cycloides, also known as the lesser hawk's beard, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family, characterized by its yellow flowers and jagged, pointed leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve liver function. The health benefits of Taraxacum cycloides include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce blood pressure, and improve overall immune function. Taraxacum cycloides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
